Package de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy

Class RuleAppContainer

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.RuleAppContainer
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<RuleAppContainer>
Direct Known Subclasses:
BuiltInRuleAppContainer, TacletAppContainer
public abstract class RuleAppContainer extends Object implements Comparable<RuleAppContainer>
Container for RuleApp instances with cost as determined by a given Strategy. Instances of this class are immutable.

    • createAppContainer

      public static RuleAppContainer createAppContainer(RuleApp p_app, PosInOccurrence p_pio, Goal p_goal)
      Create container for a RuleApp.
      Returns:
      container for the currently applicable RuleApp, the cost may be an instance of TopRuleAppCost.

    • createAppContainers

      public static ImmutableList<RuleAppContainer> createAppContainers(ImmutableList<? extends RuleApp> rules, PosInOccurrence pos, Goal goal)
      Create containers for RuleApps.
      Returns:
      list of containers for the currently applicable RuleApps, the cost may be an instance of TopRuleAppCost.
